name: @forgeax/engine-math
description: Pure-function SoA-friendly Vec/Mat/Quat math utilities for forgeax-engine.

fps.reason: library package, no runtime canvas; fps reported by hello-triangle / hello-cube apps

bench.reason: pure math micro-benchmarks rarely regress; removed from CI to save 15s runner-minutes

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; smoke gate covered by hello-triangle / hello-cube apps

spike-report.reason: not a spike package; spike artefacts archived in feat-20260511-naga-rhi-wgpu-merge M5 (PR #34 + git history)
